name: Xiandai Investment Co.,Ltd
summary: Xiandai Investment Co.,Ltd invests in and operates roads, tunnels, bridges, and ferries in China. It is also involved in investing, operating, and developing real estate; investing, operating, and managing hotels; construction, charging collection, and maintenance of expressways; provision of vehicle cleaning and parking services affiliated to expressways; and sale of auto parts, road-constructing machinery, building materials, and other metal materials. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Changsha, China.
